items.title: LinkedIn’s CEO is moving on; please hold your tearful video tributes
items.summary: Ryan Roslansky has stepped down as LinkedIn's CEO after six years running the world's largest professional network. Dan Shapero, the company's COO, takes over immediately.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Cocaine-Fueled Wild Salmon Swam Twice as Far as Sober Ones
items.summary: After scientists exposed wild fish to cocaine and a cocaine metabolite, they observed that as in the lab, fish on cocaine do not act like normal fish.

items.title: Tesla reports Q1 2026 earnings: Still profitable
items.summary: Car sales are up, battery sales and emissions credits are down.
